reforms.description: The Chilean government plans to increase the cap for the R&D tax credit, broaden the target population, and ease the certification process to stimulate stronger R&D investment, which has been low in the country.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the R&D tax credit is expected to incentivize private sector investment in research and development, thereby enhancing innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy change aimed at boosting R&D investment in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: The government plans to increase the cap for the R&D tax credit, broaden the target population and ease the certification process that establishes eligibility for the benefit.

reforms.description: A law was passed that reduces regulatory barriers for start-ups, decreasing the time to start a business from 22 to 7 days by easing the obtainment of permits and streamlining notification requirements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing regulatory barriers, the reform facilitates the establishment of new businesses, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been passed and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the regulatory landscape for start-ups, promoting entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: A law was passed that reduces regulatory barriers for start-ups, and reduces the time to start up a business from 22 to 7 days.

reforms.description: Chile has implemented ambitious housing subsidy programmes aimed at widening access to housing and promoting home ownership, particularly for first-time buyers in lower income quintiles.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The housing subsidy programmes are expected to stimulate economic activity by increasing home ownership and improving living conditions.
reforms.status_evidence: The programmes have been put into action and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy initiative aimed at addressing housing accessibility and ownership.
reforms.source_quote: The main objective has been to deliver home ownership and reduce the significant stock of inadequate housing.
